title: Caveman Output Mode
description: Compress prose when explicitly requested while preserving code, commands, paths, exact errors, configs, and validation evidence unchanged.
body: Use compact output for explicit Caveman requests. Preserve code, commands, paths, URLs, exact errors, versions, commit messages, review findings, and file contents. Compression levels: lite keeps normal grammar with short sentences; full removes filler and keeps direct technical wording; ultra uses terse labels and symbols where meaning stays exact; wenyan modes apply the same compression with classical Chinese flavor when requested. Select the requested level, keep technical tokens intact, and report validation evidence in the final answer.
